purpose: Target runtime package baseline for Symfony-native Tagging migration

required.reason: Required for Kernel, bundle registry, package config loading, and standard Symfony application runtime.
Required for the Symfony Kernel and HTTP runtime flow.
Required for service container wiring and layered service maps.
Required for loading and processing Symfony configuration files.
Required for Symfony-native route maps and route loading.
Required for bin/console and standard Symfony console integration.
Required for config/bootstrap.php environment loading baseline.
Required for YAML-based services, routes, and package configuration.

optional_followup.reason: Can be evaluated later if the runtime entry is simplified toward standard Symfony runtime bootstrap conventions.
